aiTransparency.title: AI Transparency
aiTransparency.intro: WGP uses AI systems to support professional verification.
aiTransparency.does: Analyses Matcher answers to measure technical mastery. Transcribes video interviews with Whisper.
aiTransparency.doesnt: It does not analyse facial expressions, gaze, voice or biometric features. It does not penalise typing speed. It does not use the profile photo to judge the candidate.
aiTransparency.human: The Gold badge is only issued after a senior reviewer signs. The final decision is always human and traceable.
aiTransparency.compliance: References: GDPR, EU AI Act, Directive 2000/78 on anti-discrimination.
